flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mississippi Valley State University are 28% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($31.9k vs $44.1k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.0% at Mississippi Valley State University exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($19.2k debt amortized over 10 years vs $31.9k earnings).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Mississippi Valley State University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (18.2% → 14.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Mississippi Valley State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (22.1% vs 28.2%).
